export.heading: Export Your Data
export.subtitle: Download a copy of all your data as a JSON file.

sbom.heading: Open Source Compliance
sbom.subtitle: This application provides a Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) on request, in SPDX 2.3 and CycloneDX 1.6 formats.
sbom.pending: Your SBOM download links will be emailed to {{email}} within the next day.
sbom.note: Download links will be emailed to {{email}} within the next day.

danger.heading: Danger Zone
danger.subtitle: Deleting your account will remove your personal data. Your data is retained for 30 days in case you change your mind.
danger.initiatedBody: Your account has been scheduled for deletion. You have until {{date}} to recover it.
